title: Bank Holding Companies and Change in Bank Control
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, in consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury, solicits comment on a proposal that would govern the regulatory capital treatment of certain investments in nonfinancial companies by bank holding companies. This proposal would amend the Board's consolidated capital guidelines for bank holding companies to apply a 50 percent capital charge to all investments made, directly or indirectly, by a bank holding company in nonfinancial companies u
action: Proposed rule with request for public comments.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
